title: [YTP] The Sus Zone Episode 1: The Prodigal Pingas (Part 1)
description:
This is Part 1 of the first episode of a series of Twilight Zone YouTube Poops. The original episode (and one of my all-time favorites) is titled "And When the Sky Was Opened" - Episode 11 from Season 1. This project was begun one year ago, along with StarFux 69, Tom Sus, and a future SpongeBob YTP. Stylistically speaking, inspiration for this video and my other recent poops draws greatly from the YTPers Poops4theWorld, TheRumChum, FrozenCereal.

Synopsis: Colonel Forbes (The Prodigal Pingas) returns to his butt buddy Major Gart to share some awful news: Forbes seems to be the only human alive who is able to recollect the phenomenon once known as YouTube Poop. For some strange, unknown reason, its existence has ceased entirely. Nonplussed, Gart reassures The Prodigal Pingas that he has indeed gone insane. 

For a great Twilight Zone YTP that heavily inspired this one, see https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=g4D-iKEGW1k ("[YTP] The Sus Zone") by Poops4theWorld. Also check this out https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vrqNvupKzTc (my friend's Twilight Zone poop {also 10 subscribers is too low...tetsudatte kudasai}). Be on the lookout for future uploads!
